description: 7-agent development pipeline with design review and QA verification

architect.description: Designs specifications, execution plan, test requirements

optimistic_design_reviewer.description: Validates plan against existing solutions, AXIOM goals, feasibility

pessimistic_design_reviewer.description: Finds correctness holes, principle violations, edge cases, UB risks

qa_agent.description: Verifies test conformance to agreed requirements, coverage completeness

optimistic_code_reviewer.description: Verifies implementation matches spec, patterns, quality

pessimistic_code_reviewer.description: Finds bugs, UB, race conditions, correctness issues in implementation

design.loop: architect revises until both reviewers APPROVE
design.output: agreed plan saved to docs, DESIGN.md updated

code_review.on_issues: back to architect for resolution, not coder
